title: Move a board to a folder using automation
excerpt:
An automation to allow users to move a board into a folder. 
For example you have a master tracker. When a status changes to working on it, it creates a new board which is within a folder.

posts.author: Joshbunce94 (Josh Bunce)
posts.cookedHtml:
An automation to allow users to move a board into a folder.

For example you have a master tracker. When a status changes to working on it, it creates a new board which is within a folder.
